backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management, email subscriptions, and photo upload/delete functionality with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for a black empty space below the footer in desktop view, referencing App.tsx and index.css as the affected files.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, component behavior, and notable changes across the CGCT HOPE Vision 2036 React application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar) for both light and dark themes, plus base border and background styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust (CGCT) HOPE Vision 2036' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /survey, /gallery), wraps the app in LanguageProvider and QueryClientProvider, and composes the shared Navigation/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About CGCT section rendering a timeline (2011–2026), descriptive paragraphs, and a Chairman quote card with intersection-observer-driven fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/DigitalImpactSec: Section displaying four digital transformation initiatives (Newsletter, Brand Ambassadors, School Liaison Network, WhatsApp/Email Strategy) as animated icon cards in a responsive grid.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with a CTA banner, social media links, newsletter subscription form, and navigation buttons for registration, survey, and volunteer forms.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Displays the main hero section with a countdown timer, animated stat counter cards, CTA buttons for registration and survey, and a background image with decorative overlays.
frontend/src/components/LeafMotif.tsx: Renders a configurable set of decorative leaf-shaped (rotated rounded) div elements positioned absolutely as a background motif.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll anchor links, a gallery route link, language toggle, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to authenticated users who lack a profile, prompting them to enter their name and save it via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ReunionSection.t: Section presenting the HOPE Alumni Reunion event details, a reunion poster image, participant category cards, and a list of event purposes with icons.
frontend/src/components/StakeholderVoice: Renders a section displaying six stakeholder insight cards with icons and a planning checklist, using intersection observer for scroll-triggered animations and i18n via LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/SurveySection.ts: Displays a survey participation section with links to English and Malayalam Microsoft Forms surveys, including a confidentiality badge and scroll-triggered fade-in animation.
frontend/src/components/VisionPillarsSec: Renders four Vision 2036 strategic pillars (Quality, Restructuring, Sustainability, Education) as animated cards with icons, colored accents, and translated bullet-point items.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for English/Malayalam language switching with a translation lookup function `t()` and a full static translations dictionary for both languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdown.ts: Custom hook that calculates and updates a countdown timer every second toward a fixed target date of April 12, 2026 at 9:00 AM IST.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountUp.ts: Custom hook that animates a numeric count from 0 to a target value over a given duration using requestAnimationFrame with an ease-out cubic curve.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIntersectionObserv: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when a referenced element becomes visible in the viewport, triggering a one-time visibility state change.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend actor interactions including photo gallery CRUD operations, user profile management, and email subscription submission.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the CGCT design system with custom CSS variables for brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), Tailwind base layers, and utility classes for animations and decorative elements.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Photo gallery page with lightbox viewing, image upload, download, and admin delete functionality, using React Query hooks and Internet Identity for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/SurveyPage.tsx: Survey page for the CGCT–HOPE Vision 2036 initiative, presenting language-selection buttons to redirect users to an external survey with a styled maroon/gold branded layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom brand colors (maroon, gold, sage, cream), typography/font settings, animations, and plugin imports for the CETA Galaxy project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust website, tracking a known UI bug (black empty space below footer in desktop view) as the active fix request.
